name: The Red Brigade
description: Bereaved veterans on suicide missions. War dogs, no retreat, Blood Markers at game start.
add_rules: Displeasure of the Church: Either 0-1 Trench Cleric + 0-1 Sniper Priest, OR 0-2 Sniper Priests and no Trench Cleric.
Fury of Saint Ernest: Lieutenant can have Gunslinger Skill for 5D. All models can have Molotov Cocktails at 5D. Cannot have a Troop Flag.

Glory Hounds: Can include Trench Dogs of the Red Brigade. Dogs from Glory are treated as Red Brigade dogs free. Dog count cannot exceed non-dog model count. First 2 Glorious Deeds per dog earn 2 Glory instead of 1.
No Retreat: Models cannot take a Retreat ACTION unless forced by a special rule.

Remember the Fallen: Can skip Reinforcement + Exploration steps in Campaign Phase to recover all Battlekit of killed models (excl. Mercenaries). Recovered gear added to armoury and can be redistributed to eligible models.
Wear and Tear: Start each game with 1 BLOOD MARKER per 200D of total warband cost (including Battlekit). Opponent distributes markers — no model gets 2 unless all others already have 1.

add_units.type: Trench Dogs of the Red Brigade
add_units.limit: No limit (cannot exceed non-dog model count)
abilities: Dogs of War: Cannot be Promoted. Counts as a model for Morale Checks.
Four Paws: +1 DICE to Climb, Jump, Fall, and Dash rolls.
Grenade Harness: The dog cannot use grenades to Shoot. Any friendly non-dog model within 1" of the dog at any point during their Activation can use the dog's grenades to Shoot.
Loyal Hound: Up to 2 dogs + an equal number of non-dog models can have FIRETEAM for +5D each. These Fireteams are in addition to the standard 2 Fireteams and can use Concentrated Attack.

Special Training: Each dog can take one upgrade for +5D — Attack Dog (+1 DICE Melee), Guard Dog (Limit 1: no INFILTRATOR within 12", can charge within 4" without LoS), or Mercy Dog (Limit 2: has Medi-kit, can drag Down friendly models).
Teeth and Claws: Can make a Melee Attack without a Melee Weapon.
unit_upgrades: Dog cannot fire; nearby allies can
Dog cannot fire; nearby allies can

abilities: Strength through Pain: Add +1 DICE to Melee Characteristic for each BLOOD MARKER currently on this model. Opponent cannot spend this model's BLOOD MARKERS to add -DICE to Fight rolls.
Channelled Sorrow (Atonement Bell): Off-hand attack only. No Injury Roll on hit. On Success or Critical Success, move the target D3" in a straight line in any direction.
